meaning: n.拉萨(中国西藏藏族自治区首府)
examples: From Xining to Lhasa, the railway crosses many mountains and rivers.
It's less than three hours' flight from Xi'an to Lhasa.
If my car had been more reliable, I would have driven to Lhasa instead of flying last summer.
Lhasa de Sela died after a two year battle with cancer at the age of 37.
By 2012, says a senior official in Lhasa, it will be extended to Shigatse.
